name: diag-edges-samples
description: Diagnostic — inspect actual position buffer + first edge sample range to find why bezier renders nothing.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const sm = window.__qualiaRenderer.getSceneManager(); const em = sm.edgeMesh; const geom = em.lineSegments.geometry; const posAttr = geom.getAttribute('instanceStart'); const endAttr = geom.getAttribute('instanceEnd'); const colorAttr = geom.getAttribute('instanceColorStart'); const positions = sm._store.getActivePositions(); const edges = sm._store.getActiveEdges(); const firstEdge = edges[0]; const srcPos = firstEdge ? positions[firstEdge.source] : null; const tgtPos = firstEdge ? positions[firstEdge.target] : null; return { instanceCount: geom.instanceCount, hasInstanceStart: !!posAttr, instanceStartCount: posAttr?.count, instanceStartFirst6: posAttr ? Array.from(posAttr.array).slice(0, 18) : null, instanceColorFirst6: colorAttr ? Array.from(colorAttr.array).slice(0, 12) : null, firstEdgeId: firstEdge?.id, firstEdgeType: firstEdge?.type, firstEdgeSrcPos: srcPos, firstEdgeTgtPos: tgtPos, materialOpacity: em.lineSegments.material.opacity, materialUniformResolution: em.lineSegments.material.resolution?.toArray() }; })()
